lattice_description: 2D hexagonal phononic crystal with engineered dissipation channels; PT-symmetric imaginary on-site potentials creating valley-polarized topological transport; hexagonal symmetry with broken parity-time symmetry via controlled material absorption and leakage

layer1_berry_curvature.reasoning: Conventional lattice D_ab ~0.5Å (no specific phononic crystal branch in analyzer)

layer2_spin_current.reasoning: σ_SH ≈ 1.00e-02 S/m (Kagome baseline); L_char ≈ 1.00e-04 m; J_s ≈ 3.12e+13 A/m² (3.12e+17 μA/cm²); spin accumulation ~5.92e+38 spins/m³

layer3_torsion_and_metric.reasoning: Node density ~1.00e+10 nodes/m²; spin polarization density ~5.27e-27 J·s/m³; torsion field |T| ≈ 1.09e-69 m⁻¹; theoretical δg ≈ 4.80e-146; target δg = 1e-06; gap 1.0e+94×; requires N² superradiance to N_critical ≈ 1.00e+53; equivalent area 3.16e+23 cm²

grade.description: Infeasible — δg distance from engineering threshold 10⁻⁶ exceeds 50 orders of magnitude

bottleneck.name: Metric perturbation δg
bottleneck.suggestion: N² superradiance amplification 1.0e+94×, equivalent to lattice area amplification 1.0e+47×
